case_title: STEFFEN, ANDREA VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY STEFFEN, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2005 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-17-2005, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO OCT-27-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 THE CITY NEEDS ADDITIONAL TIME TO INVESTIGATE THIS MATTER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MEMORANDUM OF INFORMAL BRIEF SUBMITTED BY THE CITY ATTORNEYS OFFICE.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-27-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-29-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. FOR PLAINTIFF TO ATTEMPT TO RETRIEVE VEHICLE IN QUESTION AND FOR FURTHER TRIAL OR DISMISSAL.
NOTICE OF TIEM AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO CCSF-REFUSED BY TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEFFEN, ANDREA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, JUDGMENT SHALL BE REDUCED TO $171.75 IF THE PLAINTIFF IS ALLOWED TO RETRIEVE THE 1973 JEEP LICENSE #5LQB687. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RETURNED TO COURT: DOES NOT BELONG TO TAX COLLECTOR.
